fa-cup-straw-swoosh.appearanceId: tall cup with a bent straw and a curved arc swoosh line extending outward; beverage cup outline with an angled drinking straw and a sweeping motion arc
fa-cup-straw-swoosh.functionalityId: adds a drink with a straw to an order or cart; represents a to-go beverage selection with straw
fa-cup-straw-swoosh.intentId: order or track a drink item with a straw; indicate a beverage choice in a food or ordering menu

fa-cup-togo.appearanceId: tapered disposable cup with a fitted lid and a small raised spout or opening at the top; travel cup silhouette with a domed lid and a drink spout
fa-cup-togo.functionalityId: adds a to-go beverage to an order; selects a takeaway drink container in a menu or cart
fa-cup-togo.intentId: order a portable take-out drink; indicate a to-go cup preference in a coffee or food order

fa-cupcake.appearanceId: single cupcake with a scalloped paper wrapper base and a domed swirl of frosting on top; round cake in a fluted cup with a tall rounded icing mound
fa-cupcake.functionalityId: selects or adds a cupcake or dessert item; navigates to a bakery or sweet treat category
fa-cupcake.intentId: browse or order a cupcake or dessert; indicate a pastry or baked good selection

fa-curling.appearanceId: round curling stone with a handle on top viewed from the side; circular flat disc with a raised cylindrical grip used in the sport of curling
fa-curling.functionalityId: selects a curling sport category or event; navigates to a winter sports section
fa-curling.intentId: browse curling sport content or events; find information about the curling sport

fa-custard.appearanceId: shallow round bowl or ramekin filled with a smooth custard surface and a slightly rounded top; small circular dish with a domed top representing a dessert
fa-custard.functionalityId: selects or adds a custard or pudding dessert item; navigates to a dessert or dairy food category
fa-custard.intentId: browse or order a custard dessert; indicate a creamy dessert selection in a menu

fa-cut.appearanceId: open scissors with two crossed blades forming an X shape at the pivot point; pair of cutting shears with elongated blades and rounded handles open at an angle
fa-cut.functionalityId: cuts selected text or objects from the current context; removes and places content onto the clipboard
fa-cut.intentId: remove selected content and move it elsewhere; cut text or media for a paste operation

fa-cutlery.appearanceId: fork and knife arranged side by side with tines and blade facing upward; two parallel utensils with a fork on the left and a knife on the right
fa-cutlery.functionalityId: opens a restaurant or dining section; navigates to food or meal-related content
fa-cutlery.intentId: find a restaurant or food venue; access dining options or meal planning features

fa-d.appearanceId: uppercase letter D with a vertical straight left stroke and a curved right side forming a semicircle; single capital alphabet character with one flat edge and one round edge
fa-d.functionalityId: represents or navigates to a section labeled D; selects or filters items beginning with the letter D
fa-d.intentId: jump to a D-indexed item or section; filter or label content with the letter D

fa-dagger.appearanceId: narrow double-edged blade tapering to a point with a short crossguard and a grip handle; elongated pointed weapon silhouette with a symmetrical cross-piece near the base
fa-dagger.functionalityId: selects a melee weapon or attack action in a game; navigates to a fantasy or combat item category
fa-dagger.intentId: equip or choose a dagger in a game inventory; access combat or weapon-related content

fa-dash.appearanceId: single short horizontal line segment centered in the space; a thin flat bar oriented horizontally
fa-dash.functionalityId: inserts a dash or separator character into text; collapses or minimizes a content section
fa-dash.intentId: add a typographic dash to a document; visually separate or divide content elements

fa-database.appearanceId: stack of three flat cylinders or discs arranged vertically resembling storage drums; layered horizontal oval shapes forming a column representing data storage
fa-database.functionalityId: opens or manages a database connection; navigates to data storage settings or records
fa-database.intentId: access or configure a database; view or manage stored data records

fa-deaf.appearanceId: human ear profile outline with a diagonal slash line crossing through it; side-view ear shape combined with a prohibition line indicating no sound
fa-deaf.functionalityId: toggles or indicates a deaf or hard-of-hearing accessibility mode; enables visual or caption-based accessibility features
fa-deaf.intentId: activate accessibility options for deaf or hearing-impaired users; switch to a captioned or visual notification mode

fa-debug.appearanceId: small bug or insect silhouette with an overlaid play or target symbol; stylized ladybug or beetle outline combined with a triangular action marker
fa-debug.functionalityId: launches a debugging session for code; steps through code to identify and fix errors
fa-debug.intentId: troubleshoot and resolve errors in a program; start a code debugging workflow

fa-dedent.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of text with a left-pointing arrow or indent indicator showing reduced indentation; stacked text lines with an outward arrow on the left margin
fa-dedent.functionalityId: removes one level of indentation from selected text or code; shifts a text block to the left
fa-dedent.intentId: decrease the indentation level of a text block; align code or content further to the left margin

fa-deer.appearanceId: full-body deer silhouette in profile facing left with antlers on top of its head; four-legged animal outline with a rack of branching antlers
fa-deer.functionalityId: selects a wildlife or deer-themed category; navigates to a hunting or nature-related section
fa-deer.intentId: browse wildlife or hunting content; access a deer-related item or category

fa-deer-rudolph.appearanceId: deer silhouette in profile with antlers and a round circular dot at the nose position; four-legged reindeer outline with a prominent round nose
fa-deer-rudolph.functionalityId: selects a holiday or Christmas-themed reindeer item; navigates to seasonal festive content
fa-deer-rudolph.intentId: access Christmas or holiday-themed content; find a reindeer or seasonal decoration element

fa-delete-right.appearanceId: rectangular backspace-style shape with a rightward-pointing notch on the left and an X or cross mark inside; eraser badge with a notched left edge and a deletion cross symbol
fa-delete-right.functionalityId: deletes a character to the right of the cursor; clears forward one character in a text input
fa-delete-right.intentId: remove text to the right of the current cursor position; delete a forward character in an input field

fa-democrat.appearanceId: donkey silhouette representing the Democratic party symbol; full-body animal outline of a donkey facing a direction
fa-democrat.functionalityId: filters or tags content related to the Democratic party; selects a Democratic political affiliation option
fa-democrat.intentId: indicate or filter for Democratic party-related content; label a political item as Democrat-affiliated

fa-desktop.appearanceId: rectangular monitor screen with a thin stand or neck and a flat base at the bottom; flat display panel outline with a centered pedestal
fa-desktop.functionalityId: switches to or opens the desktop view; navigates to a desktop application or settings
fa-desktop.intentId: access the desktop environment or display settings; switch to a full desktop interface

fa-desktop-arrow-down.appearanceId: rectangular monitor with a downward-pointing arrow overlaid on or below the screen; desktop display outline combined with a downward chevron or download arrow
fa-desktop-arrow-down.functionalityId: downloads content to the desktop; initiates a file or software download targeting the desktop
fa-desktop-arrow-down.intentId: save or download a file to the desktop; transfer content from a remote source to the local desktop

fa-desktop-code.appearanceId: rectangular monitor outline with angle bracket less-than and greater-than code symbols displayed on screen; flat display with HTML or programming chevrons on the screen face
fa-desktop-code.functionalityId: opens a code editor or development environment on desktop; launches a desktop coding or programming tool
fa-desktop-code.intentId: access a desktop coding workspace; open a development environment on the computer

fa-desktop-medical.appearanceId: rectangular monitor with a medical cross or plus symbol displayed on the screen; flat display outline combined with a healthcare cross badge on screen
fa-desktop-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical records or health application on desktop; navigates to a desktop healthcare management tool
fa-desktop-medical.intentId: access medical or health software on the desktop; manage patient or health data from a desktop interface

fa-desktop-slash.appearanceId: rectangular monitor silhouette with a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire display; flat screen outline overlaid with a prohibition or disabled bar
fa-desktop-slash.functionalityId: disables or disconnects the desktop display; indicates an inactive or unavailable desktop screen
fa-desktop-slash.intentId: turn off or disable a monitor or desktop session; indicate a desktop is offline or unavailable

fa-dewpoint.appearanceId: teardrop water droplet shape with a small horizontal dash or degree marker beside it; round-bottomed droplet outline next to a temperature or measurement tick
fa-dewpoint.functionalityId: displays the current dew point temperature reading; shows atmospheric moisture level in a weather interface
fa-dewpoint.intentId: check the dew point for weather or climate assessment; understand humidity and condensation conditions

fa-dharmachakra.appearanceId: circular wheel with multiple evenly spaced spokes radiating from a central hub and a segmented outer rim; round dharma wheel with eight or more radiating lines and a decorated border
fa-dharmachakra.functionalityId: navigates to Buddhist or spiritual content; selects a dharma or wheel-of-law symbol for a religious topic
fa-dharmachakra.intentId: access Buddhist teachings or spiritual content; indicate a dharma or religious concept in a document

fa-diagnoses.appearanceId: clipboard or document with horizontal lines representing text and a medical cross or stethoscope element; rectangular chart outline with lined entries and a healthcare symbol
fa-diagnoses.functionalityId: opens a patient diagnoses or medical records list; navigates to a clinical assessment or health findings screen
fa-diagnoses.intentId: review or manage medical diagnoses for a patient; access clinical findings or health records

fa-diagram-cells.appearanceId: grid of rectangular cells arranged in rows and columns forming a table-like structure; matrix of bordered boxes laid out in an even two-dimensional grid
fa-diagram-cells.functionalityId: opens a cell-based diagram or grid layout editor; creates or views a structured grid diagram
fa-diagram-cells.intentId: organize or visualize data in a grid or cell diagram; build a cell-structured layout or table diagram

fa-diagram-lean-canvas.appearanceId: rectangular canvas divided into multiple labeled sections or cells in a lean canvas format; flat bordered rectangle partitioned into an asymmetric grid of business-plan sections
fa-diagram-lean-canvas.functionalityId: opens a lean canvas business model diagram; creates or edits a startup strategy template layout
fa-diagram-lean-canvas.intentId: plan or document a business model using a lean canvas; organize a startup or product strategy visually

fa-diagram-nested.appearanceId: series of rectangles contained inside each other in a nested concentric arrangement; set of bordered boxes stacked inward with each smaller box inside the previous
fa-diagram-nested.functionalityId: opens or creates a nested diagram structure; displays hierarchical or encapsulated relationship diagrams
fa-diagram-nested.intentId: visualize nested or hierarchical relationships in a diagram; organize layers or encapsulated structures visually

fa-diagram-next.appearanceId: flowchart or diagram box with a rightward arrow pointing to a next step or node; rectangular process block combined with a forward-pointing connecting arrow
fa-diagram-next.functionalityId: advances to the next step in a diagram or workflow; navigates forward in a sequential process diagram
fa-diagram-next.intentId: move to the next node or step in a process diagram; progress through a sequential workflow visualization

fa-diagram-predecessor.appearanceId: connected node boxes with an arrow pointing from a preceding box into a current node; two linked rectangular shapes where the first box feeds into the second via an arrow
fa-diagram-predecessor.functionalityId: identifies or selects the predecessor task in a project diagram; navigates to the prior node in a dependency chain
fa-diagram-predecessor.intentId: review or set a task's predecessor in a project plan; trace the prior dependency in a workflow diagram

fa-diagram-previous.appearanceId: flowchart or diagram box with a leftward arrow pointing back to a previous step or node; rectangular process block combined with a backward-pointing connecting arrow
fa-diagram-previous.functionalityId: returns to the previous step in a diagram or workflow; navigates backward in a sequential process diagram
fa-diagram-previous.intentId: go back to the prior node or step in a process diagram; revisit a previous stage in a workflow visualization

fa-diagram-project.appearanceId: network of connected nodes with lines linking multiple boxes in a project flow structure; several rectangular shapes joined by lines forming a branched or linear project diagram
fa-diagram-project.functionalityId: opens a project diagram or task dependency view; creates or displays a project planning flowchart
fa-diagram-project.intentId: visualize or manage a project structure and its task dependencies; build a project plan diagram

fa-diagram-sankey.appearanceId: flowing bands of varying widths connecting source nodes on the left to target nodes on the right; tapered ribbon streams linking parallel vertical columns representing flow quantities
fa-diagram-sankey.functionalityId: renders or opens a Sankey flow diagram; visualizes proportional flow or energy transfer data
fa-diagram-sankey.intentId: analyze proportional flows or resource distribution visually; display energy or data flow with a Sankey chart

fa-diagram-subtask.appearanceId: parent task box with a smaller child box connected below it by a line; two vertically linked rectangular nodes where the lower box is indented or smaller
fa-diagram-subtask.functionalityId: adds or displays a subtask within a parent task diagram; expands a task to show its child sub-steps
fa-diagram-subtask.intentId: break a task into subtasks in a project plan; manage or view nested task structures

fa-diagram-successor.appearanceId: two connected node boxes with an arrow leading from the current box into a following node; pair of linked rectangles where the current shape points forward to the next via an arrow
fa-diagram-successor.functionalityId: identifies or selects the successor task in a project diagram; navigates to the next node in a dependency chain
fa-diagram-successor.intentId: review or set a task's successor in a project plan; trace the following dependency in a workflow diagram

fa-diagram-venn.appearanceId: two overlapping circles forming a Venn diagram with a shared intersection region in the center; pair of round shapes crossing each other to create three distinct areas
fa-diagram-venn.functionalityId: creates or opens a Venn diagram to show set relationships; displays overlapping categories or data sets
fa-diagram-venn.intentId: compare two overlapping data sets or categories visually; illustrate shared and distinct elements in a diagram

fa-dial.appearanceId: circular gauge face with a needle pointer and scale markings around the arc; round instrument dial with a central indicator needle pointing to a value on its rim
fa-dial.functionalityId: adjusts a setting or value using a rotary dial control; opens a gauge or level adjustment interface
fa-dial.intentId: fine-tune a parameter or setting with a dial control; monitor or adjust a measurable value on a gauge

fa-dial-high.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing to the upper-right high zone of the scale; round gauge with an indicator tilted toward the maximum end of the arc
fa-dial-high.functionalityId: sets or indicates a high value on a dial control; represents a setting at the upper range of its scale
fa-dial-high.intentId: select or observe a high setting on a rotary control; indicate a high-level parameter value

fa-dial-low.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing to the lower-left low zone of the scale; round gauge with an indicator tilted toward the minimum end of the arc
fa-dial-low.functionalityId: sets or indicates a low value on a dial control; represents a setting at the lower range of its scale
fa-dial-low.intentId: select or observe a low setting on a rotary control; indicate a low-level parameter value

fa-dial-max.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing fully to the far right at maximum position; round gauge with an indicator at the extreme clockwise end of the scale arc
fa-dial-max.functionalityId: sets a dial control to its maximum value; represents the highest possible setting on a gauge
fa-dial-max.intentId: maximize a parameter or setting to its upper limit; set a control to full or maximum output

fa-dial-med.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing straight up or to the center middle of the scale arc; round gauge with an indicator at the midpoint of its range
fa-dial-med.functionalityId: sets or indicates a medium value on a dial control; represents a mid-range setting on a gauge
fa-dial-med.intentId: select or observe a medium setting on a rotary control; indicate a moderate or balanced parameter value

fa-dial-med-low.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing slightly below the center toward the lower-medium zone; round gauge with an indicator between the midpoint and the low end of the arc
fa-dial-med-low.functionalityId: sets or indicates a medium-low value on a dial control; represents a below-average setting on a gauge
fa-dial-med-low.intentId: select a medium-low setting on a rotary control; indicate a slightly below-average parameter level

fa-dial-min.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing fully to the far left at minimum position; round gauge with an indicator at the extreme counterclockwise end of the scale arc
fa-dial-min.functionalityId: sets a dial control to its minimum value; represents the lowest possible setting on a gauge
fa-dial-min.intentId: minimize a parameter or setting to its lower limit; set a control to zero or minimum output

fa-dial-off.appearanceId: circular dial face with a needle pointing downward or to an off position with a circle-slash or power-off indicator; round gauge outline with an indicator at the off or null position
fa-dial-off.functionalityId: turns off or disables a dial-controlled setting; sets a rotary control to the off or inactive state
fa-dial-off.intentId: deactivate a dial-controlled parameter; turn off a feature or setting controlled by a rotary dial

fa-diamond.appearanceId: four-sided rhombus or diamond shape rotated 45 degrees forming a pointed square; a symmetrical four-cornered gem outline with equal angled sides
fa-diamond.functionalityId: marks an item as premium or special quality; selects or indicates a diamond-shaped element in a design
fa-diamond.intentId: designate a premium or high-value item; use a diamond shape as a visual marker or design element

fa-diamond-exclamation.appearanceId: diamond or rhombus shape containing an exclamation mark with a vertical bar and a dot at center; four-sided rotated square outline with an alert symbol inside
fa-diamond-exclamation.functionalityId: triggers a critical warning or alert notification; indicates an urgent error or hazard in the interface
fa-diamond-exclamation.intentId: respond to a critical warning or urgent alert; identify and address a high-priority error or hazard

fa-diamond-half.appearanceId: diamond or rhombus shape filled on one half and empty on the other half creating a split appearance; four-cornered rotated square bisected vertically with one side solid and one side outlined
fa-diamond-half.functionalityId: indicates a half-selected or partial status on a diamond-rated item; represents a mid-state or partial value in a rating system
fa-diamond-half.intentId: show a partial or half rating for an item; indicate an intermediate status in a diamond-scale evaluation
